OSSGolf

RSS

Open source golf hardware and software. DIY training aids and launch monitor SDKs you can build and own.

OSSTempo: a DIY LED tempo trainer for golf

OSSTempo is an open source golf tempo trainer.

July 6, 2026

R10Kit: an unofficial Swift SDK for the Garmin R10

R10Kit is a native Swift SDK that connects directly to the Garmin Approach R10 launch monitor over Bluetooth Low Energy.

July 6, 2026
